name: Grilled Portobello Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 3 large Fresh portobello mushrooms, stems removed and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper
2. Sprinkle with chopped oregano and chopped parsley for garnish
3. Cut the mushroom caps into quarters, placing them on a broiler pan coated with olive oil
4. Cover each mushroom quarter with garlic, salt, and pepper
5. Drizzle half of the remaining olive oil over the mushrooms
6. Place under the broiler for about five minutes, checking every two minutes until the mushrooms are tender on both tops and bottoms
7. Sprinkle with oregano and parsley, then return to the oven for another five minutes
8. Serve hot as a main course with a vegetable-rice mixture
